lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Why did the disciples lock themselves in a room?
answers: They were afraid of the men who killed Jesus
They were playing Hide and eek
They were scared of Jesus' ghost

questions.text: Who appeared to the disciples in the locked room?
What did Jesus show them to prove it was really Him?
Who was not there when Jesus first appeared to the disciples?
Thomas said he'd never believe Jesus rose unless what happened?
answers: He saw Jesus and touched his scars
An angel came to tell him

questions.text: How many days later did Jesus appear again?
What did Thomas say when he saw Jesus?
answers: How did You get in here?

questions.text: Who did Jesus say was blessed?
answers: Those who believe in him without seeing
Those who saw the empty tomb

questions.text: Who are some other people who saw Jesus after He rose from the dead?
answers: Mary, Peter, James, Paul, and more than 500 others
No one but the twelve disciples
